description_long: This is a cylindrical plastic medicine bottle with a white, child-resistant cap and a transparent amber body, commonly used for prescription or over-the-counter pills. The bottle features a blue and white label with a confetti-like pattern at the top, wrapping around the entire container. The label displays pharmaceutical branding, dosage information, warnings, and a list of ingredients, though some text is partially obscured. The cap is flat and opaque, with blue printed text on top, likely indicating prescription or dosage details. The bottle appears to be filled with yellow or orange pills, visible through the translucent plastic. The overall design is typical of pharmacy-issued medication containers found in urban environments.
description: A translucent amber plastic medicine bottle with a white child-resistant cap and a blue-and-white pharmaceutical label, filled with yellow pills.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with pharmaceutical branding, dosage, and part of the blue confetti pattern.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the warning section of the label and more of the blue confetti pattern.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the product information and ingredient list, with the confetti pattern visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the label's nutritional information and the continuation of the branding.
attribute_label_text: PHARMACEUTICAL LABORATORIES Acetyl L-Carnitine 300 mg DIETARY SUPPLEMENT MADE IN SAN DIEGO, CA. Warning: Do not exceed recommended dose. Pregnant or nursing mothers, children under the age of 18, and individuals taking blood thinners or with a known medical condition should consult a physician prior to use. Product information Each pill contains: Vitamin C Vitamin E Vitamin D Zinc NAC L-Carnitine 210 mg 210 mg 210 mg 210 mg 210 mg 210 mg
